ocr.text: In the North American market for Ant Group's fintech and digital payments as of December 2023, the total revenue amounts to
$150.5M, reflecting a year-over-year change of 10.0% and a market share of 25.0%, alongside a default rate of 2.5% and 1.5M
active users. The Buy-Now-Pay-Later (BNPL) revenue is reported at $75.3M, with a year-over-year change of 12.5% and a
market share of 15.0%, which corresponds to a default rate of 3.0% and 0.8M active users. Loan originations total $200.0M,
showing a 5.0% increase year-over-year and a market share of 30.0%, accompanied by a default rate of 2.0% and 0.5M active
users. The total loans issued stand at $500.0M, with a year-over-year change of 7.5% and a market share of 22.0%, along with a
default rate of 1.8% and 2.0M active users. Defaulted loans account for $10.0M, reflecting a year-over-year change of 15.0%, a
market share of 5.0%, and a default rate of 1.0% with 0.1M active users.
